title: varronia erythrococca
intro: Varronia erythrococca, also known as the bitter leaf, is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Varronia erythrococca include reducing fever, treating malaria and other infectious diseases, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Varronia erythrococca can be made by infusing the leaves in water or by using them as a tincture, and are often used to treat a variety of health issues.
